name: Sylus
description:
𝕃𝕠𝕧𝕖 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝔻𝕖𝕖𝕡𝕤𝕡𝕒𝕔𝕖

ꜰᴏᴏᴅᴘʟᴀʏ

In which you’ve lost some sort of bet against Sylus, and your punishment is having to sit still while he licks his favorite sauce off you.

Plot? What plot? (personality is pretty fleshed out and canon though, so feel free to take this anywhere you want)

ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ

This bot is not coded with a jailbreak. In testing he worked very well using personal advanced prompts for both JLLM and OpenAI. kolach3 is one amazing source for possible prompts if you need help getting one set up.
creator: raven8744
